# AI Nexus — llms.txt
# https://ainexustools.online

> AI Nexus is an independent AI tools review and comparison site run by Navneet Arya. Every tool reviewed has been personally tested. All affiliate links are disclosed.

## Site
- Homepage: https://ainexustools.online
- About the reviewer: https://ainexustools.online/about
- Affiliate disclosure: https://ainexustools.online/disclosure
- Contact: hello@ainexustools.online

## Review methodology
All tools are personally tested before recommendation. Minimum test period: 2–4 weeks on real tasks. Affiliate commissions disclosed on every page. Reviews are not sponsored.
